# Feature: Reliable Inspect element pick

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-17 — do not edit manually unless correcting intent -->

## Intent
Dogfood R3 PARTIAL: Inspect overlay activates but element pick was not confirmed. Ensure click selects the host element under the cursor (not overlay/dock chrome) and shows a result panel even when no scanDom selector match exists.

## Preconditions
- React InspectorOverlay + resolveInspectTarget exist

## Happy Path
- [ ] Click in inspect mode selects underlying host element
- [ ] Overlay/dock chrome is skipped in the hit stack
- [ ] Host without scanDom match still shows a fallback selection (tag/label)
- [ ] Unit tests cover chrome skip + fallback
- [ ] UI copy remains Deutsch

## Edge Cases
- [ ] Empty / overlay-only stack → clear German announcement, no throw
- [ ] Escape still closes selection / inspect

## Regression
- [ ] Existing resolveInspectTarget tests still pass

## Assumptions
- React adapter is primary; Vue/Svelte parity deferred

## Screenshots
| Step | Filename |
|------|----------|
| n/a | unit-tested |

## Implementation Notes
- Skip dock chrome in hit stack; fallback RuntimeElement when scanDom has no match
- Overlay uses explicit `pointerEvents: auto`
- Tests: dock skip + fallbackInspectElement
